name: MONOLITHIC POWER SYSTEMS INC
business: Monolithic Power Systems, Inc. is a fabless global company that provides high-performance, semiconductor-based power electronics solutions. It designs and develops products for the storage and computing, enterprise data, automotive, communications, consumer, and industrial end markets, selling primarily through third-party distributors and value-added resellers.

exposures.sentence: Enterprise Data Cloud-based and on-premises CPU servers and workstations, and artificial intelligence ( AI ) systems
Enterprise Data Cloud-based and on-premises CPU servers and workstations, and artificial intelligence ( AI ) systems
Automotive Advanced driver assistance systems, infotainment, USB connectors, body electronics, motion control, and lighting systems
Communications Network infrastructure, satellite communications, optical modules, switches, and other wireless solutions
Consumer Home appliances, gaming, smart TVs, lighting, monitors, and stereos
Industrial Power sources, industrial meters, security, and other industrial equipment
Storage and Computing Memory, storage solutions, notebooks, and graphics cards

catalysts.event: Approval of new stock repurchase program of up to $500 million through February 2028
catalysts.sentence: In February 2025 , our Board of Directors approved a new stock repurchase program authorizing us to repurchase up to $500.0 million of our common stock through February 2028 .

catalysts.event: Increase in quarterly cash dividend from $1.56 to $2.00 per share
catalysts.sentence: In February 2026, our Board of Directors approved an increase in the quarterly cash dividend from $1.56 per share to $2.00 per share, which amount will be paid on April 15, 2026 to all stockholders of record as of the close of business on March 31, 2026.

catalysts.event: Foreign subsidiary granted ten-year tax incentive beginning in 2025
catalysts.sentence: In 2024, one of the Company s foreign subsidiaries was granted a ten-year tax incentive, beginning in tax year 2025.
